desktop.sip_phone_browser_media_disabled: Enable browser media for the Virtual Desktop phone.
desktop.sip_phone_browser_media_restart_: Restart AuraGo to apply the saved browser media settings.
desktop.sip_phone_dial_prompt: Enter a SIP number or name
desktop.sip_phone_disabled_detail: Enable the SIP endpoint before using the phone.
desktop.sip_phone_error_audio_busy: Live Speech or another telephone tab is using the microphone.
desktop.sip_phone_error_audio_lease: The shared audio session is unavailable.
desktop.sip_phone_error_call_missing: The incoming call is no longer available.
desktop.sip_phone_error_domain_missing: No SIP dial domain is configured.
desktop.sip_phone_error_insecure_context: Microphone access requires HTTPS or localhost.
desktop.sip_phone_error_microphone: Microphone access was denied or no input device is available.
desktop.sip_phone_error_media_unsupporte: This browser cannot provide telephone audio.
desktop.sip_phone_error_target_required: Enter a SIP number or name.
desktop.sip_phone_favorites_empty: Save frequently used numbers for one-click calling.
desktop.sip_phone_favorites_limit: A maximum of 24 favorites is supported.
desktop.sip_phone_insecure_context: Open AuraGo over HTTPS or localhost to use the microphone.
desktop.sip_phone_managed_incoming: This call is handled by the configured SIP route.
desktop.sip_phone_not_registered_detail: The SIP account is not registered yet. Check the account and PBX connection.
desktop.sip_phone_observer_mode: This tab can observe the call but cannot take over its audio.
desktop.sip_phone_readonly_detail: SIP is in read-only mode. Calling controls are disabled.
